submitted_payload.short_desc: Free and open-source AI orchestrator for structured autonomous coding workflows.

why_this_action: Recent audit artifacts showed the biggest problem is flat primary-repo adoption and weak distribution handoff. Reddit repetition risk is high, HN/Lobsters remain blocked, and The Next AI exposed a real no-login free submit path that can point the backlink directly at Codeberg.

summary: recorded thenextai.com as a validated autonomous submit host after live POST confirmation
prioritized easy submit lanes ahead of harder untried channels so fresh executable backlink surfaces get tested sooner

measurement_window.success_signal: live The Next AI listing with backlink landing on the Codeberg primary repo
